entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in an organism.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The sum total of all the messenger RNA molecules expressed from the genes of an organism.

entities.name: PROTEOME
entities.description: The entire set of proteins that is or can be expressed by a genome, cell, tissue, or organism.

entities.name: METABOLOME
entities.description: The complete set of small-molecule chemicals found within a biological sample.

entities.name: EPIGENOME
entities.description: Chemical modifications to the DNA and histone proteins of an organism.

entities.name: PLANT SPECIES
entities.description: Various types of plants used in research.

entities.name: CROP SPECIES
entities.description: Plants grown for food or other economic purposes.

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Phenotypic characteristics influenced by multiple genes and environmental factors.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NETWORKS
entities.description: Complex sets of interacting biological entities.

entities.name: SYSTEMS BIOLOGY
entities.description: An approach focusing on the integration of multiple omics data, modeling, and prediction of cellular functions.

entities.name: MULTIOMICS DATA INTEGRATION
entities.description: The process of combining different types of omics data to gain a holistic understanding of biological systems.

entities.name: MODELING
entities.description: The creation of mathematical or computational representations of biological systems.

entities.name: PREDICTION OF CELLULAR FUNCTIONS
entities.description: The use of data and models to forecast how cells will behave or function.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL INFORMATION
entities.description: The flow of data and signals within a biological system.

entities.name: EXTERNAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Outside factors that interact with biological systems to influence phenotype.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC EXPRESSION
entities.description: The observable physical or biochemical characteristics of an organism.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops for better yield or quality.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural product produced per unit area.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops grown for their edible seeds.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants in the family Fabaceae, often used for their protein-rich seeds.
